title: marianthemum longifolium
intro: Marianthemum longifolium, also known as Fernbush, is a shrub-like plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. Consuming Fernbush is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing the risk of certain cancers, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Marianthemum longifolium can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
